'''Widdle Warrick''',<ref name="DI3.0">''[[Disney Infinity 3.0]]''</ref> also known as '''Willy''',<ref name="CE" /> was a reckless young [[Ewok]] [[Hunting|hunter]] from [[Bright Tree Village]] on the [[moon]] [[Endor]].<ref name="beware" /> Widdle was the brother of [[Winda]], [[Weechee (Ewok)|Weechee]], and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick|Wicket W. Warrick]], and the son of [[Deej]] and a [[gender|female]] [[Wicket's mother|Ewok]].<ref name="CEFamily" /> Along with another Ewok named [[Wunka]], Widdle helped the [[Wookiee]] warrior [[Chewbacca]] hijack an [[All Terrain Scout Transport|AT-ST]] [[walker]]<ref name="beware" /> named [[Tempest Scout 2]]<ref name="Preview Tempest Force">{{AtomicMassGames|url=transmission/scene-to-stat-tempest-force-battle-force|text=Scene to Stat: Tempest Force Battle Force}}</ref> crewed by [[Major]] [[Newland]] and [[Blanaid]] during the [[Battle of Endor]].<ref name="beware" /> Shortly after<ref name="Date2">{{Marvel|url=articles/comics/ewoks-comic-series-steve-orlando-alvaro-lopez-laura-braga|text='Ewoks' Comic Series Reveals What Happened to the Battle of Endor's Most Courageous Warriors}} places [[Star Wars: Ewoks (2024)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'']] directly after the events of {{Film|VI}}, which ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates to [[4 ABY]].</ref>  the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] victory over the [[Galactic Empire]] in the battle,<ref name="ROTJ" /> Widdle gathered with the [[Bright Tree tribe]], including the [[Warrick family|family]] to which the young Ewok belonged, as well as the tribe's neighbors, to meet, share stories, and decide the [[forest|forest's]] future together.<ref name="Ewoks4">[[Ewoks (2024) 4|''Ewoks'' (2024) 4]]</ref>
